caption: In a large, brightly lit indoor hall with ornate ceiling fixtures and beige walls, several people perform martial arts on a blue floor. In the foreground, a man dressed in a blue traditional tunic and trousers executes a dynamic movement, shifting his weight and extending his arm in a striking motion. Behind him, another man in a white tunic and trousers also performs movements, while a third individual in red clothing stands further back. The background shows a seated audience observing the performance. As the sequence progresses, the man in blue continues his movement, transitioning from a wide stance with an outstretched arm to a more centered, balanced posture. Simultaneously, the man in white adjusts his position, shifting his feet and arms. The overall scene captures a coordinated demonstration of martial arts forms within a formal event setting.
